accounting_policies.basis_of_accounting: Accrual basis — revenues recognized when earned, expenses when obligation incurred

revenue_recognition.standard: ASC Topic 606 (Revenue from Contracts with Customers)
revenue_recognition.franchise_royalties: Recognized monthly when earned and deemed collectible
revenue_recognition.initial_franchise_fees: Deferred until franchisee opens for business (performance obligations satisfied). Deferred revenue at Dec 31, 2024: $0
revenue_recognition.practical_expedient: ASU Franchisors (Subtopic 952-606) — pre-opening services as single performance obligation

accounting_policies.cash_equivalents: Highly liquid investments with original maturities ≤3 months
accounting_policies.accounts_receivable: Stated at amount expected to collect; direct write-off method for bad debts; $0 bad debts for FY2024

income_taxes.entity_type: LLC — income/loss allocated to members/shareholders, no federal/state provision at entity level
income_taxes.uncertain_tax_positions: Evaluated per ASC 740-10; no liability required at Dec 31, 2024

accounting_policies.concentrations_of_credit_risk: Cash in bank/deposit accounts may exceed FDIC limits; no losses experienced
accounting_policies.use_of_estimates: Required under GAAP; significant estimates include allowances for doubtful accounts, losses on contracts in process, percentage of completion

lease_accounting.status: No lease agreements in place at Dec 31, 2024

material_notes.note1_business_activity: Formed in Delaware. Principal purpose: offer and sell franchises providing non-medical at-home care services.
material_notes.note3_initial_franchise_fee_revenue: Deferred until franchisee opens. $0 deferred at Dec 31, 2024.
material_notes.note4_subsequent_events: Evaluated through January 27, 2025. Nothing requiring disclosure.

items_not_present: No impairment policy disclosed (no assets to impair)
No related party transaction note (though revenue is 100% from affiliate)
No advertising fund accounting note (BDF had $0 collections in FY2024)
observations: Notable absence: No related party transaction disclosure despite 100% of revenue ($55,013) coming from the Iowa affiliate. This is a potential disclosure gap.

The Statement of Income line 'Amortization & Depreciation' shows $1,414 but the Balance Sheet and Cash Flow show $0 fixed assets and $0 depreciation. This is a minor inconsistency — the $1,414 may relate to startup cost amortization or an immaterial timing difference.
Entity has no physical assets, no leases, no receivables, no payables — it is essentially a cash-only entity supported by one affiliate's royalty payments.
